basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Warangal has released the official notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Telangana. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: 30 years (Relaxable by up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women, and persons with disabilities)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: Up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering with minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA (55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD) for UG and PG. OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology with at least CGPA of 7.5/10 or 70% marks (7.0/10 or 65% for SC/ST/PwD) and M.Tech/M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with research areas in Communication/ VLSI/ Instrumentation.
qualification.details: Candidates with a minimum of 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/GEN-EWS/ OBC-NCL category and minimum 55% aggregate marks or 6.0 CGPA at both UG and PG for SC/ST/PwD category. OR Candidates with Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology with at least CGPA of 7.5/10 or 70% of marks under GEN/ GEN-EWS/OBC-NCL category and at least CGPA of 7.0/10 or 65% under SC/ST/PwD category. B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and M.Tech/M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Communication/ VLSI/ Instrumentation. (OR) B.Tech/B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering. A solid understanding of satellite communication, digital communication, probability theory, optimization, and wireless communications is crucial. Experience with programming languages, machine learning applications, and simulation tools such as MATLAB or Python.

salary_details.details: For candidates without National Eligibility Test (CSIR UGC NET or GATE): Rs. 30,000 + HRA (1st and 2nd Year), Rs. 33,000 + HRA (3rd Year, upon successful assessment and upgradation to SRF). For candidates with National Eligibility Test (CSIR UGC NET or GATE): Rs. 37,000 + HRA (1st and 2nd Year), Rs. 42,000 + HRA (3rd Year, upon successful assessment and upgradation to SRF).

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Warangal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application is completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E or equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering. An M.Tech/M.E in the same field with research areas in Communication/VLSI/Instrumentation is also a qualification. Alternatively, a B.Tech/B.E degree alone is considered.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 30,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, plus HRA. The exact amount depends on whether the candidate has a NET/GATE qualification and their year of service.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. Candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC categories, women, and persons with disabilities can avail of an age relaxation of up to 5 years beyond the maximum age limit.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications followed by an interview. The interview can be conducted either online or offline, depending on the institute's arrangements.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal is strictly online. Candidates are required to submit their applications through the designated online portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position announced under this recruitment drive by NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q8. What specific research areas are preferred for the M.Tech/M.E qualification?
faq.answer: For the M.Tech/M.E qualification, candidates are preferred if their research areas are in Communication, VLSI, or Instrumentation. This indicates a focus for the project.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is considered beneficial for this role?
faq.answer: A strong understanding of satellite communication, digital communication, probability theory, optimization, and wireless communications is crucial. Experience with programming languages and simulation tools like MATLAB or Python is also beneficial.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official website of NIT Warangal for more details.
